import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let tok = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(n)
      result = list.push(result, n)
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn intersect(_ a: List<Int>, _ b: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < a.len()
    let x = match a.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if list.contains(b, x) and not list.contains(result, x)
      result = list.push(result, x)
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn sort_ints(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  mut remaining = xs
  while remaining.len() > 0
    let m = match list.min(remaining)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    sorted = list.push(sorted, m)
    mut new_remaining: List<Int> = []
    mut found = false
    mut j = 0
    while j < remaining.len()
      let v = match remaining.get(j)
      when Some(val)
        val
      when None
        0
      end
      if v == m and not found
        found = true
      else
        new_remaining = list.push(new_remaining, v)
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    remaining = new_remaining
  end
  sorted
end

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end
  let ints1 = parse_ints(line1)
  let ints2 = parse_ints(line2)
  let inter = intersect(ints1, ints2)
  let sorted = sort_ints(inter)
  if sorted.len() == 0
    println("empty")
  else
    mut output = ""
    mut i = 0
    while i < sorted.len()
      let v = match sorted.get(i)
      when Some(val)
        val
      when None
        0
      end
      if i == 0
        output = "#{v}"
      else
        output = "#{output} #{v}"
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    println(output)
  end
  Ok(())
end
